text:
Created attachment 183111
Proposed patch (since 441503 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.4 to 1.6.5 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.4...v1.6.5
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.5/NEWS#L1-L6

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
